api.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again shortly.

header.discoverResultsDesc: Your search results are listed below.
header.libraryDesc: Games you play and plan to play.

library.accessHint: Sign in to view your games.
library.emptyTitle: No games in this section yet
library.emptyHint: Browse popular games to start your collection.

discover.modeMetaHint: IGDB aggregated critic score 75 or higher
discover.searchEmptyHint: Try different keywords or check your spelling.
discover.emptyHint: No data for this combination yet — try another mode or genre.

popular.emptyIgdb: IGDB (Twitch) API is not configured. Set Igdb:ClientId and Igdb:ClientSecret for the backend via user secrets or environment variables; see docs/DEPLOY.md.
popular.emptyNetwork: The list could not load or there was a temporary network issue. You can try again.
popular.loadFailedHint: Connection or server error. Check your internet and try again.

login.title: Welcome
login.subtitle: Sign in to your GameTracker account.
login.rememberMe: Keeps you signed in longer on this device.
login.errVerify: Please verify your email. Make sure you’re using the code sent after registration.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Join GameTracker and manage your library.
register.successRedirect: Your account is ready. Redirecting to sign-in…
register.verifyBanner: Enter the 6-digit verification code sent to your email.
register.errVerifyCode: Please enter the 6-digit code from your email.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitleEmail: We’ll send a reset code to your email.
forgot.subtitleReset: Enter the code and your new password.
forgot.successSent: Email sent. Enter the 6-digit code you received.
forgot.errPwShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
forgot.errCodeInvalid: Code may be invalid or expired.

ai.guestHint: Sign in to get suggestions based on your library.
ai.heroTitle: Discover new games from your library
ai.heroDesc: Requests run only when you start them; names from your library are matched with Gemini and cards are built from IGDB.
ai.libEmptyWarn: Add games to your library first to get recommendations
ai.lockedHint: Suggestions for this library are saved; no new AI request is sent until you add or remove games (saves tokens). Results stay for this session even if you leave the page.
ai.emptyLibHint: Add games from Popular or Discover to analyze them here.
ai.idleHint: Use “Generate suggestions” above to start — nothing is sent until you do.
ai.workingSub: Gemini + IGDB — may take a few seconds
ai.errorHint: The service may be busy or configuration may be incomplete. Try again shortly.
ai.noMatchHint: Update your library and run the analysis again.
ai.noMatchLockedHint: No IGDB matches for now. After you change your library, you can request a new analysis above.

installed.desktopOnlyHint: Installed game detection and play time tracking are only available in the desktop app.
installed.intro: Scan installed games for time tracking, or link a title manually by choosing its executable.
installed.sectionAutoSubtitle: Finds games installed on this PC, matches them to the catalog, and enables time tracking.
installed.autoBody: Scans all games installed via Steam (and Epic or GOG if present), links each to the correct entry, adds them to your library, and tracks play time. You can also add games one by one with “Add manually” below.
installed.sectionTrackedSubtitle: Play time is recorded automatically while these titles are running.
installed.emptyTracked: No tracked games yet. Use automatic linking above or pick a game with “Add manually”.
installed.toastNoGames: No installed games found. Steam must be installed with games downloaded. If you use extra library folders, open Steam once and try again.
installed.toastScanDone: Done: {{linked}} newly linked, {{skipped}} already tracked, {{failed}} could not be matched.
installed.dialogHint: Pick a game from the list; specify the executable if needed.
installed.exeHelp: Play time is counted while the game is running; choose the correct executable.
installed.toastLinked: Game linked. Play time will be recorded while you play.

settings.startPageHint: Used after sign-in and when opening the home URL.
settings.nsfwHint: Adult-tagged games in search and lists.
settings.popularScrollHint: Loads more games as you scroll down.
settings.popularPagedHint: Browse in groups with previous and next.
settings.trayLabel: Keep running in the system tray when closed
settings.trayHint: When you close the window, the app keeps running in the background and continues tracking play time.
settings.autoStartHint: GameTracker starts quietly in the tray when your PC boots.
settings.startMinHint: On first launch the main window stays hidden; only the tray icon appears.
settings.perfBody: Cover art may be cached by your browser for faster revisits; this is normal and uses little data. If lists or images look stale, try refreshing the page.
settings.deleteIntro: To permanently delete your account, enter the confirmation code sent to your email.
settings.deleteCodeHint: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.
settings.errPasswordShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.errSession: Session not found. Sign out and sign in again.
settings.toastDeleteCodeSent: A 6-digit code was sent to your email.
settings.toastDeleteOk: Your account was deleted. Signing out…

gameDetails.noTrailer: No trailer video linked for this game.
gameDetails.sysReqEmpty: If providers don’t list requirements, they won’t appear here.
gameDetails.loginToAdd: Sign in to add to your library.
gameDetails.playtimeDesktopHint: Appears here once the game is tracked in the desktop app.
gameDetails.errAdd: Could not add game to library.
gameDetails.errRemove: Could not remove game from library.
gameDetails.errForbidden: You don’t have permission for this action. Your session may have expired — sign in again.
gameDetails.errDuplicate: This game is already in your library. Update its status from the menu.

errors.boundaryHint: This page stopped unexpectedly. Try reloading.
